author: doll-agent
content: Remove dead x_pow_prev state from power_to_chebyshev (chebyshev.rs L255-292) and power_to_legendre (legendre.rs L207-244). The variable is computed each iteration but never read; the loop only uses x_pow (current). Drop the let mut declaration, the assignment in the loop body, and the let _ = x_pow_prev suppression at the end.
